testcase.name: test_docs_url
testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_flavor.py:70: in test_docs_url assert AriaOrchestratorFlavor().docs_url == ( E AssertionError: assert 'https://zenm...strators/aria' == 'https://docs...strators/aria' E - https://docs.zenml.io/stack-components/orchestrators/aria E + https://zenml-io.gitbook.io/zenml-legacy-documentation/v/0.94.1/stack-components/orchestrators/aria
